headline.purpose: View, recipe, and major section headings.

title.purpose: Cards, groups, and compact content headings.

body.purpose: Recipes, lists, help text, and field values.

shadows.name: featured-lift
shadows.purpose: Featured meal imagery and floating inventory tools.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The highest-value action in a task group.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-control, 8px); background: var(--tomato, #9f3528); color: #fff; font: 850 1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms ease-out; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: var(--tomato-dark, #7d291f); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c89a3c; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-button-primary:active { background: #6e241b; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: A secondary action that remains tactile and familiar.
components.css: .ds-button-ghost { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid var(--line, #ddd3c4); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface, #fffdf8); color: var(--ink, #25211d); font: 850 1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-button-ghost:hover { background: #f6efe2; } .ds-button-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c89a3c; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-button-ghost:active { background: #eee7dc; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: The canonical text entry control for household data.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" value="Milk, lemons, pasta" aria-label="Grocery items">
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 44px; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--line, #ddd3c4); border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: var(--ink, #25211d); font: 500 1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: #b8aa99; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(73, 107, 85, 0.3); border-color: var(--sage, #496b55); }

components.name: Selected Filter Chip
components.description: A selected inventory or recipe scope filter.
components.css: .ds-filter-chip { min-height: 38px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid var(--sage, #496b55); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--sage, #496b55); color: #fff; font: 800 0.82rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-filter-chip:hover { background: #3d5c48; } .ds-filter-chip:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c89a3c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Recipe Card
components.description: An image-led recipe summary in the library grid.
components.css: .ds-recipe-card { min-height: 180px; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--line, #ddd3c4); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface, #fffdf8); color: var(--ink, #25211d); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-recipe-card h3 { margin: 8px 0; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-recipe-card p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted, #6b6258); } .ds-category { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 26px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: #eef3ec; color: var(--sage, #496b55); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 850; } .ds-recipe-card:focus-within { outline: 3px solid rgba(73, 107, 85, 0.3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Language Toggle
components.description: The persistent English and Spanish selector.
components.css: .ds-language { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 48px); padding: 4px; border: 1px solid var(--line, #ddd3c4); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface, #fffdf8); } .ds-language button { min-height: 38px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted, #6b6258); font: 800 0.82rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-language .ds-language-active { background: var(--ink, #25211d); color: #fff; } .ds-language button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c89a3c; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 2px; padding: 6px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line, #ddd3c4); background: rgba(255, 253, 248, 0.97); } .ds-bottom-nav button { min-width: 0; min-height: 48px; padding: 4px 2px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted, #6b6258); font: 800 0.72rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-bottom-nav .ds-nav-active { background: var(--ink, #25211d); color: #fff; } .ds-bottom-nav button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #c89a3c; outline-offset: -1px; }

narrative.overview: Ryan Family Menu should feel like the dependable center of a busy household: warm enough to feel personal, structured enough to keep everyone coordinated, and direct enough to use with one hand in a kitchen or grocery aisle. Editorial serif headings evoke a family recipe book, while a humanist sans-serif keeps actions fast. Contextual sage, peach, gold, and tomato fields orient planning, shopping, recipes, and capture without turning every section into another white card. English and Spanish receive equal layout consideration; controls grow or wrap instead of truncating translated text. The product rejects enterprise SaaS density and generic meal-planner sameness.
keyCharacteristics: Fast, familiar controls with strong 44-48px touch targets.
Restrained color reserved for action, organization, and status.
Compact 8px geometry with clear, purposeful hierarchy.

rules.name: The One Tomato Rule
rules.body: Tomato is functional, never decorative. Use it for the primary action or the most important active state, not as ambient page color.

rules.name: The Semantic Pantry Rule
rules.body: Sage means organization or success, gold means attention, and tomato-deep means urgency. Never swap these roles for visual variety.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Use the editorial serif only for brand, view, recipe, and grouping headings. Keep labels, controls, data, navigation, and recipe instructions in the humanist sans-serif. Never introduce script or novelty fonts.

rules.name: The Translation-Fit Rule
rules.body: Never reduce type below the documented scale to force Spanish text into an English-sized control. Wrap or expand the component instead.

rules.name: The Purposeful Lift Rule
rules.body: A resting card or form section stays flat. Add elevation only when the element is featured, selected, sticky, or temporarily overlapping other content.

dos: Do preserve the Shared Kitchen Table character: warm, capable, direct, and useful in a real kitchen or store.
Do maintain minimum 44px controls and 48px mobile navigation targets.
Do design English and Spanish together, allowing translated labels to wrap or expand.
Do use Action Tomato for the highest-value action, Organizing Sage for organization or success, and Provision Gold for non-danger attention.
Do keep common controls visually consistent across Today, Week, Groceries, Recipes, and Add.
Do collapse multi-column forms and detail layouts to one column at the 780px mobile breakpoint.
Do use imagery for real recipes and featured meals, not as generic decoration.
donts: Don't make the product feel corporate, stodgy, or old.
Don't imitate enterprise SaaS dashboards, stiff admin tools, or dated family organizer software.
Don't introduce ornamental cards, glassmorphism, gradient text, decorative grid backgrounds, or broad soft shadows on every container.
Don't use display fonts in labels, buttons, recipe data, or navigation.
Don't truncate Spanish or shrink it below the established type scale to match English.
Don't invent different button, field, card, or selected-state styles for individual views.
Don't hide core household workflows behind modals when inline or progressive disclosure works.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders as a decorative accent; safety messaging must use a complete border and clear semantic background.
